academic_requirements.summary: Applicants need a minimum three-year undergraduate degree (or equivalent) and the academic background required for forest and natural resource studies.
academic_requirements.prior_degree_or_diploma: A minimum three-year undergraduate degree (or equivalent) is required.
academic_requirements.subject_requirements: Applicants must show proven basic skills in ecological, silvicultural, economic and technical areas for natural resources management, production processes and land conservation.
academic_requirements.gpa_or_country_requirements: The Academic Committee considers the final graduation mark of the first study cycle or, where necessary, the average grades shown in the Transcript of Records. For Italian entry qualifications, the minimum requirement stated on the programme page is 90/110.

accepted_proofs: One of the English certificates accepted by the University of Padua, with the minimum score required for English-taught degree programmes.
A degree programme title delivered entirely in English, documented as required by the University.
Exemption for native English speakers from the citizenship list accepted by the University.
exemption_rules: Applicants can use a degree completed entirely in English if the documentation explicitly states the language of instruction.
Native English speakers holding one of the nationalities listed by the University are exempt from submitting a certificate.
language_requirements.deadline: For open-access English-taught degree programmes, the University states that the language requirement must be met by 31 August 2026.

application_deadline_eu.notes: The third call is only for EU citizens and non-EU citizens residing in Italy.

application_deadline_non_eu.notes: The third call is not available to non-EU citizens residing outside Italy.

required_documents.notes: Required for English-taught master's degree applications with a foreign qualification.
Required for English-taught master's degree applications with a foreign qualification.
Upload the transcript; if the document is not in English or Italian, include a translation.

required_documents.document_name: University degree certificate or provisional graduation/enrolment certificate
required_documents.notes: If the degree has not yet been awarded, the University accepts proof of current enrolment or a provisional final certificate.
EU applicants and non-EU applicants residing in Italy can upload a valid identity document; other applicants upload a passport.
Required only for applicants residing in Italy who hold a residence permit.

required_documents.document_name: English language certificate or other accepted proof
required_documents.notes: Required if the programme entry requirements ask for it and the applicant is not covered by an exemption.

required_documents.document_name: Bachelor's diploma translated into Italian or English and legalised
required_documents.notes: The original qualification documents are required for enrolment; legalised copies are not required at application stage.

required_documents.document_name: Transcript of Records translated into Italian or English and legalised
required_documents.notes: The transcript should state passed exams and, where applicable, credits, grades and programme description.
Required for non-EU applicants residing outside Italy.

required_documents.document_name: Passport or ID and residence permit/Assicurata
required_documents.notes: Applicants submit an ID or passport; non-EU applicants also submit a residence permit or residence-permit application receipt where applicable.

entry_exam_or_test.test_name: No standard written entry exam; the Teaching Commission may request an interview if needed.
entry_exam_or_test.applies_to: All applicants; an interview is only requested if the commission considers it necessary during academic assessment.
entry_exam_or_test.dates: No fixed test date is published.
entry_exam_or_test.scoring_or_threshold: Admission is based on assessment of curricular requirements and academic background. For non-EU applicants residing abroad, a merit list is used only if eligible candidates exceed available places.

source_quotes.quote: A minimum three-year undergraduate degree (or equivalent) is required.
If needed, the candidate will be asked to sit for an interview

uncertainty_notes: No programme-specific English call for international applicants with a foreign qualification was found for this open-access programme; the official international application page is used as the closest official reference for deadlines and documents.
